key_points: To add integers with different signs, find the difference of their absolute values
Subtraction is the addition of the additive inverse
Product of two integers with the same sign is positive
Product of two integers with different signs is negative
Division follows the same sign rules as multiplication
exam_tips: When subtracting, 'change the sign and add'
Count the number of negative signs in multiplication; even = positive, odd = negative
Be careful with the sign of the larger absolute value in addition
